name: Viltrum
description: Viltrum was the home planet of Nolan Grayson/Omni-Man and his people, the Viltrumites, and was the capital of the Viltrum Empire.
It was destroyed by the combined efforts of the Coalition of Planets at the peak of the Viltrumite War, rendering the remaining native Viltrumites homeless and the Empire without a capital.

name: Earth
description: Earth is a rocky, terrestrial planet with a diverse and dynamic surface. Its landscape features mountains, valleys, canyons, plains, and a wide variety of other geological formations.
Known as an ocean planet, roughly 70% of Earth's surface is covered by vast bodies of water, shaping both its climate and the billions of life it supports.

name: Thraxa
description: Thraxa is alien planet and the home world of the Thraxan race. Very little is known about Thraxa except the inhabitants have significantly shorter lifespans than most other species and there are a total of 42 billion inhabitants that live there.

name: Dornin
description: Dornin is the home planet of Battle Beast and his people, the Dornians.

name: Flaxan Dimension
description: The Flaxan Dimension is the home Planet of the Flaxan race.

name: Gelderia
description: Gelderia is the homeworld of the Gelderians that were under attack by the Viltrum Empire.

name: Glacia Prime
description: Glacia Prime is a planet that was formerly conquered by the Viltrum Empire, but was later liberated by the Coalition of Planets.

name: Mars
description: Mars is the home planet of the Martian race.

name: Quintessa
description: Quintessa is a planet that was formerly conquered by the Viltrum Empire, but was later liberated by the Coalition of Planets.

name: Savage Planet
description: Savage Planet is the home planet of the incredibly dangerous savage extraterrestrial non-sapient creatures, the Rognarrs.

name: Talescria
description: Talescria is a planet that serves as the headquarters of the Coalition of Planets.

name: Unopa
description: Unopa was the home planet of Allen the Alien and his people - the Unopans, before it was destroyed by the Viltrum Empire.

name: Urath
description: Urath is a planet, that Allen was supposed to check on. it is known among the fandom as "space Australia"

name: Wasteland Universe
description: The Wasteland Universe is a desolate and barren reality in the Multiverse. It was reduced to its current state from unknown causes.
